steps.label: cause
steps.text: A dry Amontillado combines biological and oxidative aromatic development.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Moderate chilling preserves freshness and limits alcohol warmth without suppressing its nutty, savoury and acetaldehyde-derived aromas.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: A service temperature around 13 C can balance freshness, alcohol and aromatic expression.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Amontillado is served cool rather than very cold so its developed aromas remain expressive.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
